text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet and I drop by the shopping district
on our way back from a day out.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What's with the crowd?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a coupon
for a hot spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, so today's the raffle. I'd better put this to use!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: This raffle ticket. A friend gave it to me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
She said it was thanks for helping her with her
homework. Hmph! Like I wouldn't have done it
anyway.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But, well... seeing as I have the ticket, I might as
well cash it in. Let's give it a spin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We get in line, and I watch as Daiwa Scarlet spins
the lever on the raffle machine.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! The grand-prize?! Did I really win?! I-I
mean, yay!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I knew I could do it. When it comes to
luck, I'm always number one!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... When should we go? The expiration date
is quite a while off.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I guess I should just keep it safe for now.
choice_data_list: You're not going to use it right away?
You're not going to use it right away?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I don't think so. I mean, we're in the middle of a
very important series. Neither of us have time to
take a break just yet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I want to make the most of this chance to relax...
and I want you to make the most of it too.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Are you being serious? ...Dummy.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, forget it! At any rate, now's not the time!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
So, you keep it for now. I don't think I can trust
myself with it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But you'd better not use it on yourself! It's my prize, got that?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At Daiwa Scarlet's insistence, I end up holding on
to the coupon until the time comes to use it.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hehe, not bad! I'll never turn down being first! ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you hungry or something?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Then, here. You can have it. I've got food at the
dorm anyway.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Would you get a clue already?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This is where you're supposed to nod and say
thank you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a bad cook, you know. I could whip
something like this up for you anytime—if you
wanted.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...So ask me. I don't mind doing something nice
for you once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I appreciate the sentiment, but it's her prize, and it does look really good. I'd like her to try it too...
choice_data_list: How about we eat it together?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. That's fine too, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both Daiwa Scarlet and I feast on carrot
hamburger steak that day.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I got... second place?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
No way! I don't want second place, race or not!
Just the thought of the number two makes me
sick!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Are you sure you don't have a
ticket?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You don't sound sure. Turn out your pockets. I
bet you've got one somewhere!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It takes a full body check for Daiwa Scarlet to
release me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, it isn't the carrots' fault they were the
second-prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to think of a way to incorporate them
into Daiwa Scarlet's nutrition plan...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, so much for that. At least I won something.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
But still, a single carrot, huh... I wonder what I
should make with it...
choice_data_list: You're going to cook with it?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'd like to make something for the friend
who gave me the ticket.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm a model student, after all. I have to repay her
kindness.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, maybe a carrot cake? That sounds good.
Everyone likes sweet things.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet and I pick up some groceries on the
way back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Aww... I guess I should have expected that. That's
normal, after all. But still...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Just coming out and saying "tough luck" like that
really ticks me off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wary of letting Daiwa Scarlet's anger explode in
public, I decide to accompany her back to school.
